title: The job market was bruising in 2025. The start of 2026 doesn't look much better.
title_zh: 2025 年的就业市场一片惨淡。2026 年初的情况看起来也好不了多少。
summary: A slew of data releases this past week suggested that at the start of 2026, the job market remained stuck at best — and flashed further signs of splintering at worst.
summary_zh: 上周发布的大量数据表明，2026 年初，就业市场充其量仍处于停滞状态，而最坏的情况则显示出进一步分裂的迹象。

title: AI Fear Grips Wall Street as a New Stock Market Reality Sets In
title_zh: 随着新的股市现实的到来，人工智能的恐惧笼罩着华尔街
summary: Last week, those concerns suddenly spilled over into the stock market. In response, investors dumped a broad range of stocks, from Expedia Group Inc. to Salesforce Inc. to London Stock Exchange Group Plc.
summary_zh: 上周，这些担忧突然蔓延到股市。作为回应，投资者纷纷抛售大量股票，从 Expedia Group Inc. 到 Salesforce Inc. 再到伦敦证券交易所集团 (London Stock Exchange Group Plc)。

title: Why I am still taking these tech stocks to task
title_zh: 为什么我仍然对这些科技股持批评态度
summary: Tech stocks are not getting any love from me after a wild week.
summary_zh: 经过疯狂的一周后，科技股并没有得到我的任何喜爱。

title: Dow 50,000 sets table for inflation data, delayed January jobs report: What to watch this week
title_zh: 道指 50,000 点为通胀数据奠定基础，推迟 1 月份就业报告：本周关注点
summary: As investors turn toward the coming week, Wall Street will look to build on Friday's sharp turnaround into the green as investors process the drastic software and crypto sell-off.
summary_zh: 随着投资者转向未来一周，随着投资者处理软件和加密货币的大幅抛售，华尔街将寻求在周五的急剧转向绿色基础上继续前进。

title: Analysis-Investors chase cheaper, smaller companies as risk aversion hits tech sector
title_zh: 分析——随着避险情绪冲击科技行业，投资者追逐更便宜、规模较小的公司
summary: Investors are turning to cheaper, smaller companies while reassessing how much risk they are willing to take owning volatile assets after market whipsaws pounded some sectors and assets.
summary_zh: 在市场震荡重创一些行业和资产后，投资者正在转向更便宜、规模较小的公司，同时重新评估他们愿意承担持有波动性资产的风险。

title: Op-ed: Rotation isn't the answer to the tech uncertainty
title_zh: 专栏：轮换并不是解决技术不确定性的答案
summary: Economist Mohamed El-Erian considers the current tech sell-off brought on by "secular uncertainty" and suggests that swapping one theme for another might not work this time.
summary_zh: 经济学家穆罕默德·埃尔-埃里安认为，当前的科技股抛售是由“长期不确定性”引起的，并表示这次将一个主题换成另一个主题可能行不通。

title: Big Tech companies are starting to look like IBM in the 1960s
title_zh: 大型科技公司开始变得像 20 世纪 60 年代的 IBM
summary: The race to dominate the burgeoning AI market is pushing tech giants to adopt business models reminiscent of IBM's in the 1960s.
summary_zh: 为了主导新兴的人工智能市场，科技巨头纷纷采用让人想起 20 世纪 60 年代 IBM 的商业模式。

title: Jennifer Garner-backed kids' food brand Once Upon a Farm rises 16% in Wall Street debut
title_zh: Jennifer Garner 支持的儿童食品品牌 Once Upon a Farm 在华尔街上市首日股价上涨 16%
summary: The stock jumped in its public debut to $21 per share.
summary_zh: 该股首次公开亮相时飙升至每股 21 美元。

title: Bezos's 'darkest day' and the limits of billionaire-backed media
title_zh: 贝索斯的“至暗日子”和亿万富翁支持的媒体的局限性
summary: Billionaires aren't saving media platforms as much as they are redefining them, as Jeff Bezos has in deep cuts to the Washington Post.
summary_zh: 亿万富翁们并没有像杰夫·贝索斯（Jeff Bezos）对《华盛顿邮报》的大幅削减那样，拯救媒体平台，而是重新定义它们。
